title: beidoubagel's Electro Crits
description: Turn your Crit Particles into the Electro hit numbers from Genshin Impact!
body:
This mod changes the regular Crit Particles that appear when you get a Critical Hit on a mob to the Electro hit numbers from Genshin Impact!

To use, just download the .zip file and open minecraft, hit esc and click resource packs, then select "open resource pack folder" and move the downloaded file to the folder.

Please join the Discord Server if you wish to see any other element get a resource pack like this.
